feature_signal: Cross-platform RPG Maker interpreter with broad runtime/audio/text backend support (SDL2/3, FreeType/HarfBuzz, MIDI, Ogg, Opus).
evidence: README requirements list runtime stack and compatibility scope for RPG Maker 2000/2003.
urpg_target_lane: Lane 3.8 Editor Productivity + runtime portability hardening

feature_signal: Map/data toolchain with map rendering, format conversion, cache generation, and localization extraction.
evidence: README lists LMU2PNG, PNG2XYZ, XYZ2PNG, XYZCrush, GENCACHE, LcfTrans, and LCFVIZ.
urpg_target_lane: Lane 3.4 Sprite Pipeline Toolkit + import diagnostics

feature_signal: Heavily extended cross-platform RGSS runtime focused on broad project compatibility and non-Windows support.
evidence: README describes XP/VX/VX Ace support, portability, and enhanced mkxp compatibility goals.
urpg_target_lane: Lane 1 Compat bridge exit + runtime isolation strategy

feature_signal: Large active MZ/MV plugin corpus with explicit branch migration policy and documented migration status tracking.
evidence: README details mz_master branch policy and migrated plugin tracking sheet.

feature_signal: Advanced map stack (custom tile sizes, region collision, parallax/lighting/fog layers), movement, time, async event helpers, and Steam integration.
evidence: README enumerates Advanced Maps, Movement, Time, Async, and Steam modules.
urpg_target_lane: Lane 2 Wave 1 UI/Menu + Lane 3.3 Modular Level Assembly

feature_signal: Single-plugin bundle for engine tuning: render throttling, pixel modes, map zoom/camera, option UX, battle QoL, and enemy scaling hooks.
evidence: README lists general/map/options/battle tweak groups including performance and zoom controls.
urpg_target_lane: Lane 3.8 Editor Productivity + runtime performance toggles

feature_signal: Tactical SRPG battle system plugin lane with permissive plugin licensing footprint.
evidence: Repository description states SRPG tactical battle system scope; terms file indicates MIT coverage for plugin components.

feature_signal: Multiplayer/network plugin direction for MZ with source-visible integration points.
evidence: Repo metadata and README identify multiplayer intent and development/source-only status.

feature_signal: RPG Maker-style database editor UX adapted as engine plugin module (Godot addon model).
evidence: README describes database editor inspired by RPG Maker and plugin activation workflow.

feature_signal: Modern plugin development workflow with scaffold/build/test automation for MV/MZ plugin families.
evidence: README includes scaffold/build/test tasks and release artifact flow.

feature_signal: Direct Tiled roundtrip editing of RPG Maker MV/MZ maps, including layer/event metadata transfer.
evidence: README-RPGMaker states direct load/save to original map files, map metadata and event structure visibility, and MV/MZ support.
urpg_target_lane: Lane 3.3 Modular Level Assembly importer + map authoring adapters

feature_signal: RGSS crash/error telemetry bridge with startup/update checks and OTLP endpoint forwarding.
evidence: Topics include opentelemetry/otlp and rgss; rb/rgss_telemetry.rb shows on_start, check_update, on_error, and on_exit hooks with OTLP URL wiring.

feature_signal: LDB binary introspection utility for RM2k/RM2k3 research and migration debugging.
evidence: README states conversion of LDB binary/hex data into readable indented text output for analysis.
urpg_target_lane: Lane 1 Compat import verification + migration diagnostics

feature_signal: Custom PHP site engine with docs and service layer structure for RPG Maker community workflows.
evidence: README and top-level layout show custom engine core with controllers/models/services/routes and docs.
